【High Quality Black Frame】The 2008 poster is pre-assembled in a great 8.8 x 10.8in frame. The inside of the frame includes a clear plastic panel on the front, a 2008 poster, and a hanger & sturdy stand on the back. It can be displayed hanging on a wall or standing on a table
【Premium Material】Poster made of thick cardboard, surface laminated durable for long-time use
【Perfect Gift】This classic 18th birthday decoration set is a perfect gift for men or women home decor. Suitable for so many occasions - birthday party, wedding or any time a special gift is needed

【What you get】1 pack 2008 poster card (pre-framed), 1 pack 8.8 x 10.8in frame; Each order is with friendly customer service and warm help; There is a film in the front glass of photo frame to prevent scratches during transportation, and you will get a brighter glass after uncovering it
